assertions.title: Navigation links exist between all four views

steps.action: Open each page (traffic, lcp, cls, inp) with valid credentials
steps.expected: Each page shows nav links to all four views
steps.observed: All four pages rendered Traffic/LCP/CLS/INP links

steps.action: Run DOM eval for nav anchors
steps.expected: Each page has visible links to the other three views
steps.observed: Each page had 4 visible rum-nav-link anchors with unique targets rum-traffic/lcp/cls/inp

evidence.network: Resource timing showed bundles.aem.page fetches during page loads; agent-browser network logger returned no captured requests

steps.observed: Arrived at rum-lcp with same domain and domainkey parameters

evidence.network: Resource timing included bundles.aem.page requests after navigation

steps.action: Set time range to Last Month on LCP view
steps.expected: UI value and URL state reflect month selection
steps.observed: Dropdown value became 30d and URL had t=30d
CLS showed Last Month selected and URL retained t=30d

evidence.network: Resource timing included bundles.aem.page day-bucket requests on destination

assertions.title: Navigation preserves filters

steps.action: Apply a URL filter on CLS by clicking a URL facet value
steps.observed: Source URL contained filters=[{"col":"url",...}] and filtered data

steps.expected: Destination keeps same filter state in URL and UI
steps.observed: Destination URL had no filters param and filtered state was not preserved

evidence.network: Resource timing showed bundles.aem.page requests; destination state lacked filter query
evidence.sourceFilterState: CLS URL had filters query for selected URL facet

assertions.issues: Filter state was dropped when navigating from CLS to INP.

steps.action: Inspect nav links on current view
steps.expected: Exactly one nav element is active and visually distinct
steps.observed: INP link had class 'rum-nav-link active' with distinct color/fontWeight; others were non-active

evidence.network: Resource timing showed ongoing bundles.aem.page fetches

steps.action: Load traffic view without checkpoint filter
steps.observed: Visible listboxes were URL/Device Type/OS/Checkpoint only

steps.action: Select checkpoint value 'click' from Checkpoint facet
steps.observed: URL gained checkpoint click filter and visible listboxes included 'Click Source values' and 'Click Target values'

evidence.network: Resource timing showed bundles.aem.page requests while reloading filtered state
evidence.after: Visible listboxes included Click Source values and Click Target values; filters included checkpoint=click

assertions.title: Round-trip navigation preserves state

steps.action: Start on traffic with checkpoint=click filter and additional URL state
steps.observed: Start params included domain/domainkey/t=30d/n=20/filters plus hash #f=url
Returned URL kept domain/domainkey/t/n but dropped filters and hash

evidence.network: Resource timing showed bundles.aem.page requests across round-trip

assertions.issues: Round-trip navigation did not preserve full URL state (filters/hash lost).

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests reported 'No requests captured' during flows.
frictions.resolution: Used performance.getEntriesByType('resource') as fallback network evidence per guidance.

frictions.description: Checkpoint value 'click' was not visible in initial Top 5 checkpoint facet list.
frictions.resolution: Expanded checkpoint facet using 'other' twice (Top 5 -> Top 10 -> Top 20), then selected 'click'.

summary: Tested 7 navigation assertions: 5 passed (VAL-NAV-001/002/003/005/006), 2 failed (VAL-NAV-004, VAL-NAV-007 due to filter/hash state loss during navigation).
